description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a sharply pointed nose and a predominantly black exterior. The wings are swept back and mounted at a mid-level position, each featuring large, prominent propellers. The tail section is angular, with twin vertical stabilizers extending upward and outward, giving it a distinctive, aggressive profile. The engines are mounted on the wings, and the rear of the airplane features two visible exhaust nozzles. The cockpit is smoothly integrated into the fuselage, with a dark, streamlined canopy that suggests an enclosed, single-seat configuration.
description: A futuristic black airplane with swept mid-mounted wings, large propellers, twin vertical stabilizers, and a streamlined, enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the swept-back wings, large propeller, and angular twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed nose, symmetrical wing and propeller arrangement, and narrow fuselage.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other wing and propeller, as well as the rear exhaust nozzles.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the twin vertical stabilizers, dual exhaust nozzles, and the back of the propellers.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with swept wings and no visible winglets; wings are mounted at the center of the fuselage and feature large propellers.
attribute_engine_type: Twin propeller engines mounted on the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizer tail with an angular, V-shaped configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with two main units and a nose gear, partially visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a streamlined canopy integrated into the fuselage.
